channel.title: Posts on Guidelines 4 dev
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Guidelines 4 dev

item.title: Development of a flood forecasting system in hydrographic basins by means of artificial neural networks
item.description: What’s up hacker, sudo? This paper proposes the development of a flood forecasting system to mitigate issues in hydrographic basins. It was presented and published at the IADIS International Conference Intelligent Systems and Agents in 2010 in Germany.
